title: Implement incremental region room rebuild and navigation versions
summary: Implement local Region/Room invalidation and rebuild, navigation versioning, and room consistency checks for terrain, walls, doors and occupancy-affecting changes.
acceptance: Wall, door and terrain changes mark affected chunks or regions without synchronous full-map rebuilds
Region graph and room ids expose monotonic navigation versions consumed by pathing
Tests cover local wall removal, door toggles, cross-boundary movement and room consistency
Dirty rebuild benchmark records queue length, processed cells and no sustained growth
